testsuite.name: com.example.frere.config.WebJarsResourceTest

testcase.name: BootstrapのCSSがWebJars経由でアクセスできる()
BootstrapのJSがWebJars経由でアクセスできる()
存在しないWebJarsリソースへのアクセスで404が返る()
htmxのJSがWebJars経由でアクセスできる()

testsuite.system-out: 2026-03-30T16:23:34.452+09:00 INFO 72928 --- [ Test worker] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.frere.config.WebJarsResourceTest]: WebJarsResourceTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-03-30T16:23:34.454+09:00 INFO 72928 --- [ Test worker] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.frere.FrereApplication for test class com.example.frere.config.WebJarsResourceTest
